name: Notion
description: Create, read, update pages and query databases in Notion
author: awaitstep

action.label: Action
action.description: The Notion API action to perform.

databaseId.label: Database ID
databaseId.description: Notion database ID. Used by: Create Page (as parent), Query Database.

pageId.label: Page ID
pageId.description: Notion page ID. Used by: Get Page, Update Page.

properties.label: Properties
properties.description: Page properties object. Used by: Create Page, Update Page.

content.label: Content
content.description: Plain text paragraph to add as page content. Used by: Create Page.

filter.label: Filter
filter.description: Notion filter object. Used by: Query Database.

sorts.label: Sorts
sorts.description: Notion sorts array. Used by: Query Database.
